title: neolabatia sessiliflora
side_effects: Neolabatia sessiliflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may also lead to liver damage, kidney strain, and increased blood pressure. In some cases, individuals may experience allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, misuse of the plant may also result in interactions with other medications, exacerbating pre-existing conditions or leading to unintended health complications.
